findings.evidence: Lines 50-53 define `degreeSection (x₀ : X) : ℤ →+ S.ClassGroup`; the right-inverse statement only appears at lines 80-85 under `hx₀ : w x₀ = 1`.
findings.fix: Describe it as the homomorphism `n ↦ n • [x₀]`, and say it becomes a section of `weightedDegreeClass` when `w x₀ = 1`.
findings.issue: `degreeSection` is documented as “The section ... of the degree map”, but the declaration has no `w`, `h`, or `w x₀ = 1` hypothesis and is only a section in the later theorem `weightedDegreeClass_comp_degreeSection`.

findings.evidence: Lines 106-110 give `degreeRetraction ... : S.ClassGroup →+ S.ClassGroup`; membership in `picZero` is proved separately at lines 120-124 with `hx₀ : w x₀ = 1`.
findings.fix: Document it as the degree-correction homomorphism `c ↦ c - (deg c) • [x₀]`; reserve “lands in `picZero`” or “retraction” for `degreeRetraction_mem_picZero`/the splitting hypotheses.
findings.issue: `degreeRetraction` is documented as a “retraction ... onto `picZero`”, but its codomain is `S.ClassGroup` and it lands in `picZero` only under `hx₀ : w x₀ = 1`.

summary: The new file has a module docstring and most declarations are documented, but two public API docstrings describe unconditional maps as if they already had the weight-one splitting property. Tighten those docstrings so they describe the actual declaration first and state the section/retraction property only under the later hypotheses.
